return(function(...)local S={"\047\110\067\115\043\122\061\061","\052\080\054\119\081\068\061\061";"\118\118\078\101\107\083\102\051","\056\073\118\121\053\073\097\115\055\053\070\070\053\118\075\101";"\070\047\054\089\068\105\053\071\081\104\090\089\080\070\056\089";"\073\118\106\116\053\073\055\109\069\070\116\104\112\122\061\061","\066\102\065\115\115\068\061\061","\100\122\075\074\118\121\061\061","\090\080\097\120\114\083\049\107\071\119\108\122\103\098\054\119","\050\078\055\106\082\053\098\120\083\074\061\061";"\113\081\121\100\119\083\076\087\087\083\121\061";"\076\043\097\052\116\121\061\061","\050\078\055\047\085\108\083\098";"\085\080\055\119";"\085\100\075\104\079\080\098\103\073\100\113\120\077\069\116\103";"\076\065\068\098\083\115\071\097\076\068\061\061","\077\121\103\082\099\068\061\061";"\071\122\089\115\122\074\061\061","\069\085\086\110\043\083\085\098\079\088\079\105\069\100\055\099\088\122\061\061","\050\078\104\119\083\080\052\047";"\082\082\082\121\120\068\061\061","\109\065\073\087\122\052\113\106","\119\106\116\089\049\122\089\114\118\047\043\061","\067\085\087\075\087\099\050\061","\118\101\100\057\070\084\076\108\112\052\122\061","\115\054\119\116\051\116\078\111\088\047\108\068\111\048\117\119","\077\105\055\083\116\068\061\061","\083\073\120\068\098\121\061\061","\109\050\068\113";"\075\090\113\102\086\106\043\072","\074\111\076\076\074\050\089\090\097\075\050\084\051\122\061\061","\076\118\101\118\110\122\061\061","\057\073\071\083\071\088\087\056","\118\055\070\072";"\050\078\104\114\085\078\055\103\074\078\098\103\073\108\112\120\083\053\104\047\055\108\067\097\082\080\055\067\085\084\074\072\056\068\061\061";"\069\070\052\084\043\121\061\061";"\068\112\119\121\079\070\090\101\122\054\087\067\105\052\081\117\110\066\083\067\057\121\061\061";"\066\090\067\099\043\122\061\061";"\109\103\083\073","\069\070\052\049\083\053\081\061","\084\083\049\055\102\113\120\065\114\089\085\102\085\076\086\098\073\122\061\061","\052\073\098\043\078\122\061\061","\054\049\111\1 return(function(S,V,h,c,I,Q,W,y,J,t,s,D,E,Z,M,g,H,e,z,F,C,m,k,u)g,u,C,k,Z,y,s,t,m,E,D,H,z,e,J,M,F=function(S,T)local V=s(T)local h=function()return z(S,{},T,V)end return h end,function(S,T)local
